title: Pivot Tables & Dashboards
description: Unlock the true analytical power of Excel. Learn how to summarize millions of rows of data using Pivot Tables, and build interactive, dynamic dashboards using Pivot Charts and Slicers. This course turns raw data into actionable business intelligence.

seo_metadata.title: Excel Pivot Tables & Dashboards Certificate | ProCerix
seo_metadata.description: Learn to build interactive Excel dashboards. Master Pivot Tables, Pivot Charts, Slicers, and data visualization.

learning_outcomes: Create and format basic to advanced Pivot Tables
Group data and create calculated fields within Pivot Tables
Design and customize Pivot Charts for data visualization
Build interactive dashboards using Slicers and Timelines
Connect multiple Pivot Tables to a single Slicer for dynamic filtering

modules.title: Mastering Pivot Tables
modules.description: The fundamentals of summarizing large datasets.

lessons.title: Creating Your First Pivot Table
lessons.content:
Introduction to Pivot Tables

A Pivot Table allows you to extract significance from a large, detailed data set. To create one, your data must be organized in a tabular format with clear headers.

lessons.title: Grouping and Sorting Data
lessons.content:
Organizing Information

You can group dates into months or quarters, or group numbers into ranges. Sorting helps highlight top or bottom performers instantly.

lessons.title: Calculated Fields
lessons.content:
Custom Calculations

Instead of adding formulas to your raw data, you can create a Calculated Field directly within the Pivot Table to perform mathematical operations on existing fields.

modules.title: Data Visualization with Pivot Charts
modules.description: Turning summarized data into visual insights.

lessons.title: Creating Pivot Charts
lessons.content:
Visualizing Data

A Pivot Chart is connected to a Pivot Table. When the table updates, the chart updates automatically. Learn to choose the right chart type (bar, line, pie) for your data.

lessons.title: Formatting for Impact
lessons.content:
Design Best Practices

Remove clutter, use consistent colors, and ensure your charts tell a clear story without overwhelming the viewer.

modules.title: Building Interactive Dashboards
modules.description: Combining elements to create a dynamic reporting tool.

lessons.title: Using Slicers
lessons.content:
Interactive Filtering

Slicers are visual filters. They are much easier to use than standard drop-down filters and can be connected to multiple Pivot Tables simultaneously.

lessons.title: Using Timelines
lessons.content:
Filtering by Date

A Timeline is a special type of Slicer designed specifically for date fields, allowing users to easily filter data by days, months, quarters, or years.

lessons.title: Dashboard Assembly
lessons.content:
Putting It All Together

Learn how to arrange your charts and slicers on a single worksheet, hide gridlines, and create a seamless, app-like experience for your users.

mcqs.question: What is the primary requirement for raw data before creating a Pivot Table?

options.content: It must be formatted as currency

mcqs.question: Which feature allows you to perform mathematical operations within a Pivot Table without altering the source data?
When a Pivot Table updates, what happens to its associated Pivot Chart?
What is a Slicer used for in an Excel Dashboard?

options.content: To cut data from one sheet to another

mcqs.question: What type of Slicer is designed specifically for filtering date fields?
Can a single Slicer control multiple Pivot Tables?

options.content: Only if they are on different worksheets
Only if they are Pivot Charts

mcqs.question: To improve the visual appeal of a dashboard, you should typically:

options.content: Add as many colors as possible

mcqs.question: If you want to view your sales data grouped by Quarters in a Pivot Table, what must the original data contain?
What happens if you add new rows to your raw data range after creating a Pivot Table?

options.content: You must refresh the Pivot Table (if the source is dynamic/table)

mcqs.question: A Calculated Field operates on which of the following?
